title: Toad Head Basic
description: This is the recommend mod-pack for ToadCraft servers. It is like Optifine on steroids, with a few other optimisation mods and recommended mods.
body:
This is the recommended modpack for the Toad Head servers. You can still use Vanilla if you like, but we recommend this modpack. This modpack is essentially Optifine on steroids with a few extra optimisation mods.

Our website is [www.toadhead.net](https://www.toadhead.net/)

Icon is made by [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/)
